scenario: akm-workflow adapter recognize(component, file) for every file in tests/fixtures/bundles/akm-workflow/. Both the markdown workflow (≈OKF concept) and the YAML program form derive type=workflow; conceptId strips the extension. SPECIFICATION golden.
adapterStatus: NOT IMPLEMENTED — spec-authored target the future akm-workflow adapter must reproduce (future Chunk-2 format-adapter work item).
specSource: docs/design/akm-0.9.0-bundle-adapter-spec.md §7 (akm-workflow adapter row: native workflow format, export facet), §6 (workflow row: '.md/.yaml/.yml workflow; markdown≈OKF, YAML program is an AKM extension'), §1.3 (conceptId = path − recognized ext).
realWorldSource: AKM-native format — grounded in the existing akm workflow codec (src/workflows/renderer.ts, src/workflows/program/) and the frozen all-types stash fixtures (tests/fixtures/stashes/all-types/workflows/all-types-workflow.md, all-types-workflow-program.yaml)
notes: SPECIFICATION golden — no dedicated akm-workflow adapter exists in src/core/adapter/adapters/ (workflow recognition currently lives in the akm matcher stack: matchers.ts classifyBySmartMd looksLikeWorkflow + classifyByWorkflowProgram). The markdown workflow and the YAML program both emit type=workflow but render via different renderers (workflow-md vs workflow-program-yaml) — see renderer.json.
conceptId strips the recognized workflow extension (.md OR .yaml/.yml) — mirrors the frozen placement golden's workflowSpec (strips any of .md/.yaml/.yml).
The YAML program form (version + steps) is an AKM extension, NOT an OKF concept; the markdown workflow form IS an OKF-shaped markdown concept.

release.md.name: release
release.md.description: A minimal linear release workflow (markdown form ≈ OKF concept).
release.md.derivation: .md workflow (markdown ≈ OKF concept); type=workflow (spec §6 workflow row).

deploy.yaml.name: deploy
deploy.yaml.description: Minimal YAML workflow program (the program form is an AKM extension).
deploy.yaml.derivation: .yaml program (version + steps) → workflow (AKM extension, spec §6 workflow row).
